'''âp-t-zh''' ('''kapatazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polyadenylate|polyadenylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polyadenylate|polyadenylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-t-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kapatazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipatazh|thipatazh]] || [[word:jipatazh|jipatazh]] || [[word:shipatazh|shipatazh]] || [[word:kipatazh|kipatazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupatazh|thuthupatazh]] || [[word:jujupatazh|jujupatazh]] || [[word:shushupatazh|shushupatazh]] || [[word:kukupatazh|kukupatazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupatazh|thupatazh]] || [[word:jupatazh|jupatazh]] || [[word:shupatazh|shupatazh]] || [[word:kupatazh|kupatazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupatazh|thupatazh]] || [[word:jupatazh|jupatazh]] || [[word:shupatazh|shupatazh]] || [[word:kupatazh|kupatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepatazh|thepatazh]] || [[word:jepatazh|jepatazh]] || [[word:shepatazh|shepatazh]] || [[word:kepatazh|kepatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopatazh|thothopatazh]] || [[word:jojopatazh|jojopatazh]] || [[word:shoshopatazh|shoshopatazh]] || [[word:kokopatazh|kokopatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopatazh|thopatazh]] || [[word:jopatazh|jopatazh]] || [[word:shopatazh|shopatazh]] || [[word:kopatazh|kopatazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopatazh|thopatazh]] || [[word:jopatazh|jopatazh]] || [[word:shopatazh|shopatazh]] || [[word:kopatazh|kopatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpatazh|thĂŠpatazh]] || [[word:jĂŠpatazh|jĂŠpatazh]] || [[word:shĂŠpatazh|shĂŠpatazh]] || [[word:kĂŠpatazh|kĂŠpatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapatazh|thathapatazh]] || [[word:jajapatazh|jajapatazh]] || [[word:shashapatazh|shashapatazh]] || [[word:kakapatazh|kakapatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapatazh|thapatazh]] || [[word:japatazh|japatazh]] || [[word:shapatazh|shapatazh]] || [[word:kapatazh|kapatazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapatazh|thapatazh]] || [[word:japatazh|japatazh]] || [[word:shapatazh|shapatazh]] || [[word:kapatazh|kapatazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapatazh|shapatazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapatazh|goshapatazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapatazh|gokishapatazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapatazhnĂŒ|shapatazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapatazhnknĂŒ|goshapatazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapatazhnĂŒ|gokishapatazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapatazhshĂ«|shapatazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkshĂ«|goshapatazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapatazhshĂ«|gokishapatazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapatazhro|shapatazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkro|goshapatazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapatazhro|gokishapatazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapatazhmu|shapatazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkmu|goshapatazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapatazhmu|gokishapatazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapatazhsher|shapatazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapatazhnksher|goshapatazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapatazhsher|gokishapatazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapatazhng|shapatazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkng|goshapatazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapatazhng|gokishapatazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapatazhya|shapatazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkya|goshapatazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapatazhya|gokishapatazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapatazhyam|shapatazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkyam|goshapatazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapatazhyam|gokishapatazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapatazhnĂŒshĂ«|shapatazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapatazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapatazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapatazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapatazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapatazhnĂŒro|shapatazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapatazhnknĂŒro|goshapatazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapatazhnĂŒro|gokishapatazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapatazhnĂŒmu|shapatazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapatazhnknĂŒmu|goshapatazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapatazhnĂŒmu|gokishapatazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapatazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shapatazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapatazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapatazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapatazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapatazhshĂ«ro|shapatazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkshĂ«ro|goshapatazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapatazhshĂ«ro|gokishapatazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapatazhshĂ«mu|shapatazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkshĂ«mu|goshapatazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapatazhshĂ«mu|gokishapatazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapatazhronĂŒ|shapatazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkronĂŒ|goshapatazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapatazhronĂŒ|gokishapatazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapatazhroshĂ«|shapatazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkroshĂ«|goshapatazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapatazhroshĂ«|gokishapatazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapatazhromu|shapatazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkromu|goshapatazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapatazhromu|gokishapatazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapatazhmunĂŒ|shapatazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkmunĂŒ|goshapatazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapatazhmunĂŒ|gokishapatazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapatazhmushĂ«|shapatazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkmushĂ«|goshapatazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapatazhmushĂ«|gokishapatazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapatazhmuro|shapatazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapatazhnkmuro|goshapatazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapatazhmuro|gokishapatazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
